name: SomeIpAddFieldToEventgroup
title: SomeIpAddFieldToEventgroup
syntax: long SomeIpAddFieldToEventgroup( dword pevgHandle, dword pfHandle );
description: This function assigns a Field which was created by SomeIpAddField to an Event Group which was created by SomeIpAddProvidedEventGroup.
The Field can be removed from the Event Group with SomeIpRemoveFieldFromEventGroup.

parameters.name: pevgHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the Event Group that should be assigned to an Event (see SomeIpAddProvidedEventGroup).

description: In this example, it is assumed that the utilized field is contained in the FIBEX database that is assigned to the CANoe configuration. The field has the Notification ID 30, the Getter ID 31, and the Setter ID 32. The data type of the field is a standard data type (for example, UINT8).
